response.justification: Candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer with strong breadth across JavaScript/TypeScript, Node.js, and DLang, but the resume shows minimal recent Java/Kotlin work and no demonstrated experience with Spring, Quarkus, Hibernate, JVM internals, or IDE/language tooling. Java appears only in brief mentions from 2014-2018 roles. The role specifically requires deep JVM and Spring expertise plus IDE-internals interest, which is not evidenced here.
strengths: Long track record on complex, large-scale systems and developer tooling
Past experience contributing to an IDE (LabWindows/CVI) and language-tooling libraries
Strong software craftsmanship: TDD, CI/CD, testing frameworks, open-source maintenance
concerns: No demonstrated Spring, Quarkus, or Hibernate experience
Limited and dated Java exposure; no evidence of deep JVM or Kotlin expertise
Recent work centered on TypeScript/Node and DLang rather than JVM ecosystem

key_factors.factor: Prior IDE and language-tooling work (LabWindows/CVI, Trial, Fluent-Asserts)
